title: Fix demo black_band_transparent.py for V2 API
description: Demo fails with ModuleNotFoundError: pypixoo.animation. Migrate black_band_transparent.py to V2 API and verify real-device execution.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Starting fix now. Root cause: demo still imports removed legacy animation API.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Code fix implemented: migrated demo from legacy animation API to V2 (GifSequence + CycleItem + start_cycle). Syntax check passes. Real-device validation blocked by current connectivity failure to 192.168.0.37 (ConnectTimeout during Pixoo.connect).

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Re-test completed with device reachable. Validation passed: Done (transparent blend) runs and exits with 'Done (transparent blend)'.
